buildCommand: pnpm --filter @warpath/shared build && pnpm --filter @warpath/api build && pnpm --filter @warpath/web build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; script-src 'self' https://vercel.live; frame-src 'self' https://vercel.live; connect-src 'self' https: wss:
